comment: P34 — expected release rhythms per source. Drives the refresh cadence and the next-release surface (S46, Wave 6). monthsAfterPeriodEnd/expectedMonth are approximate by design — staleness alerts use the staleAfterDays grace.

qcew.notes: BLS QCEW: ~5 months after quarter end

oews.notes: May vintage published the following spring

usaspending.notes: nightly publication; checked daily for the Micron FAIN
